rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in the `annex agree` block of the component type or implementation.
Use visible symbols (ports, constants) in AGREE expressions; avoid implementation-specific paths in component type contracts.
generic_rules: Output dependency guarantees should relate visible outputs to visible inputs.
Align helper declaration types with expression types (bool, int, real).
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use the format `guarantee "label": expression;` for guarantees.
Define boolean ranges with `eq name : bool = expression;`
anti_patterns: Do not include AADL property names (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly in AGREE expressions.
Avoid using subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AADL structural extraction details (component types, implementations, features, connections, properties, owners)
